name: 360Learning
description: Monitor 360Learning LMS for compliance training completion and user management.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to 360Learning as an admin
2. Go to Settings > API
3. Copy your Company ID and API Key (v1 credentials)
4. If you don't have API credentials, contact your 360Learning Customer Success Partner (CSP)
5. Enter both values below

Note: API v2 credentials are NOT compatible. Use API v1 credentials only.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your 360Learning API v1 key. Go to Settings > API to generate or find your API key.

credentialFields.label: Company ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your 360Learning company ID. Found in Settings > API or ask your 360Learning Customer Success Partner.

checks.name: 360Learning Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies that the 360Learning LMS is accessible and lists platform users.

checks.name: 360Learning Training Completion
checks.description: Verifies that employees have completed required training courses in 360Learning.
